name: riannah's garden
summary: V1 is live on Cloudflare with closed-beta auth/RBAC, admin user provisioning, plant CRUD, watering+repot schedules/events, and post-v1 hardening now in main (auth validation, persistent login bootstrap, API security + HSTS + cross-domain + DNS-prefetch-control + COOP + COEP + CORP + Origin-Agent-Cluster + X-Download-Options headers, __Host- session cookie hardening, no-store cache-control, and logout Clear-Site-Data response hardening promoted via verified develop deploy + release flow).
